tagline.value: The repo-root resolution capability — the one sanctioned place that answers "where is the root of this repository?"

description.value: The repo-root resolution capability — the one sanctioned place that answers "where is the root of this repository? " Two modes: a lazy, git-based resolver for runtime (asks git for the toplevel, via @bounded-systems/proc), and an eager . git-marker directory walk for build/cod…
